Pricing

SELF™ Pricing: Realistic Costs for Responsible Implementation

🎯 Our Pricing Philosophy

SELF is priced to ensure responsible use, not to maximize revenue.

We structure costs to:

  1. Cover safety infrastructure maintenance and evolution
  2. Fund Doctrine development and compliance monitoring
  3. Support implementers with resources and guidance
  4. Prevent misuse through appropriate cost barriers

No hidden fees. No surprise charges. No safety compromises.

📋 Pricing (Usage‑Based)

1. Evaluation Tier

For: Non-production testing and internal evaluation

Cost: $0 (Free)

Includes:

  • Full SELF engine access
  • Complete documentation
  • Safety Packet examples
  • Doctrine compliance tools

Limitations:

  • No production deployment
  • Watermarked outputs
  • Limited to 100 conversations/month
  • No commercial use

Best for: Teams assessing SELF's fit before commitment

2. Standard Production (Non‑Exclusive)

For: Production deployments that want a simple, predictable baseline with pay‑as‑you‑go scaling

Cost: $300/month platform fee + usage

Includes:

  • Production deployment rights
  • Up to 25,000 conversations/month included
  • Doctrine updates and compatibility notices
  • Email support (48-hour SLA)

Overage: $1.00 per 1,000 additional conversations

Best for: Most production launches

3. Pro Production (Non‑Exclusive, Higher Limits)

For: Higher‑volume deployments that need more included usage and faster support

Cost: $500/month platform fee + usage

Includes:

  • Production deployment rights
  • Up to 100,000 conversations/month included
  • Doctrine updates and compatibility notices
  • Priority email support (24-hour SLA)
  • Incident response coordination channel (as needed)

Overage: $0.75 per 1,000 additional conversations

Best for: Teams scaling to large volumes

4. Academic/Non‑Profit Tier

For: Verified academic institutions and 501(c)(3) non-profits

Cost: $0 (Free)

Includes:

  • Full SELF engine access
  • Up to 5,000 conversations/month
  • Basic support (72-hour SLA)
  • Research collaboration opportunities

Requirements:

  • Verified academic/non-profit status
  • Public safety commitment
  • Annual impact reporting

Best for: Research and public benefit applications

💰 Realistic Cost Examples

Example 1: Mental Health Chatbot Startup

  • Tier: Standard Production
  • Conversations: 15,000/month
  • Total: $300/month ($3,600/year)

Example 2: Crisis Support Non-Profit

  • Tier: Academic/Non-Profit
  • Conversations: 3,000/month
  • Total: $0/year

Example 3: Enterprise Mental Health Platform

  • Tier: Pro Production
  • Conversations: 1,500,000/month
  • Base: $500/month (includes 100,000)
  • Usage: 1,400,000 ÷ 1,000 × $0.75 = $1,050/month
  • Total: $1,550/month ($18,600/year)

🔍 What You're Actually Paying For

If you want the deeper rationale for why this governance layer has ongoing costs, see:

  • WHY_GOVERNANCE_COSTS_MONEY.md

Safety Infrastructure (60% of revenue)

  • Doctrine development and maintenance
  • Safety protocol evolution
  • Abuse pattern detection updates
  • False calm prevention research
  • Compliance monitoring systems

Implementation Support (25% of revenue)

  • Documentation and examples
  • Safety Packet templates
  • Compliance audit tools
  • Incident response guidance
  • Community resources

Governance and Oversight (15% of revenue)

  • License compliance monitoring
  • Doctrine enforcement
  • Safety violation investigations
  • Ethical review processes
  • Continuous improvement

Usage pricing exists to keep incentives aligned: you pay more when you scale, and governance stays funded as real usage grows.

⚠️ Important Cost Considerations

1. Implementation Costs

SELF licensing is only part of your total cost:

  • Integration development: $50,000-$200,000
  • Safety protocol training: $10,000-$50,000
  • Compliance audit preparation: $5,000-$20,000
  • Ongoing safety monitoring: $20,000-$100,000/year

2. Hidden Costs of Not Using SELF

If you build your own:

  • Safety protocol development: $200,000-$1M
  • Legal liability exposure: Unquantifiable
  • Reputation risk: Priceless
  • Incident response costs: $50,000-$500,000 per event

3. Cost of Safety Failures

One preventable incident can cost:

  • Legal settlements: $1M-$10M+
  • Regulatory fines: $100,000-$10M
  • Reputation damage: 30-50% revenue loss
  • User trust: Impossible to quantify

SELF's cost is insignificant compared to the cost of failure.

📝 Pricing FAQ

Q: Why isn't there a free tier for production use?

A: Emotional safety requires professional discipline. Free tiers encourage experimentation without accountability. We provide free evaluation and academic tiers instead.

Q: Can we negotiate custom pricing?

A: No. Uniform rates prevent safety dilution. Everyone pays the same published rates for the same tier and usage.

Q: What happens if we exceed our conversation limit?

A: You’ll be billed for overage at your tier’s per‑1,000 rate. We’ll notify you at 80% and 100% of your included usage.

Q: Are there discounts for long-term commitments?

A: No. Safety isn’t discounted. Pricing is already usage-based; longer commitments don’t change rates.

Q: What's your refund policy?

A: No refunds for the current billing period. If you cancel, service ends at the end of the paid period.

Q: Can we get a discount for referring other customers?

A: No. We don't incentivize safety adoption through financial rewards. The value of SELF should speak for itself.

🎯 The Real Value Proposition

What You Get

  • Defensive infrastructure that protects you legally
  • Uniform safety standards that prevent race-to-bottom
  • Ongoing evolution of safety protocols
  • Community of responsible implementers
  • Peace of mind from knowing you're doing it right

What You Avoid

  • False safety claims that create liability
  • Fragmented protocols that miss edge cases
  • Compliance gaps that expose you to risk
  • Safety failures that harm users and reputation
  • Legal exposure from preventable incidents

SELF should be affordable—but still accountable.

🚀 Getting Started

  1. Evaluate for free with the Evaluation Tier
  2. Review the Doctrine to understand requirements
  3. Complete the Safety Packet exercise
  4. Choose your tier based on honest usage estimates
  5. Sign the Commercial License without modification
  6. Implement with discipline or face termination

Pricing isn't the barrier—safety discipline is.

If you can't afford responsible implementation, you can't afford to work in emotional safety.

📞 Contact Us

For pricing questions or to discuss your specific needs:

Email: licensing@soulsynqai.com

Response Time: 3-5 business days

Note: We don't negotiate on pricing or safety standards

Remember: The cost of SELF is an investment in preventing the next emotional safety failure.

The cost of not using SELF could be catastrophic.
